_meta.failure_shape: v2.2.0 Verified-live discipline — failure mode (C): PRE-POPULATED-STATE MASKING
_meta.originating_failure: heirship-app-v2 R15/R16 (blank popup + tally): the agent tested the Carter demo matter whose early steps are pre-populated from the matter record. The tally reads 'N/N answered' and no blank-popup can fire — the feature looked absent but was only masked. On a genuinely-blank step (Estate) the feature actually works: '0/4 answered' → Continue → the blank-popup listing will/probate/debts/taxes. The bug was the test state, not the code.

verification_artifact.observed_state: Family History step shows 12/12 answered; no popup fires on Continue because tally is saturated

bug_description.summary: On a step with blank answers, clicking Continue must show a blank-popup listing the unanswered items
bug_description.gesture_pattern: navigate to a step with N/Y answered where N < Y → click Continue → blank-popup appears listing the (Y-N) unanswered items
bug_description.blank_state_definition: step's tally shows X/Y answered with X < Y; for the Estate step that's '0/4 answered' (will, probate, debts, taxes)

_corrected_verification_artifact._note: what a correct verification looks like — uses a blank matter OR navigates to the Estate step where 0/4 is the natural state
_corrected_verification_artifact.observed_state: Estate step shows 0/4 answered (will, probate, debts, taxes)
